question: Comment organiser la documentation d'un projet ?

principles.text: Split par type/audience (Diataxis): tutorials, how-to guides, reference, explanation. Chaque info a un seul endroit. Mettre a jour docs dans le meme commit que le code. Supprimer docs mortes. Le framework Diataxis evite le melange tutorial/reference qui rend la doc inutilisable.

sources.name: Google SWE Book Ch.10 — Documentation
sources.quote: Treat documentation like code: review, test, maintain

sources.name: Google Style Guide — Doc Best Practices
sources.quote: Each document should have one purpose and one audience

sources.name: Diataxis Framework
sources.quote: Four documentation modes: tutorials, how-to, reference, explanation

sources.name: SWEBOK v4 — Software Engineering Management
sources.quote: Documentation is a key engineering artifact requiring maintenance

sources.name: Martin Fowler — Architecture Decision Records
sources.quote: Record decisions as lightweight documents alongside code
